public_reputation: Known locally through day-to-day work as archive auditor.
appearance: Practical layers, inspection tools, and a habit of carrying evidence or notes keep inquiry visibly close at hand.
manner: Rarely states more than necessary, testing reactions and leaving room to maneuver. In Soreheim Alliance, that reads as someone quota-aware, contribution-minded, and structurally pragmatic, filtering choices through communal ambition, and the habits of a archive auditor still shape how they handle timing, silence, and attention.
daily_function: Performs the ongoing duties of archive auditor in and around Miners’ Assembly, where the role has practical consequences even when nothing dramatic is happening.
current_agenda: Keep Miners’ Assembly workable through the obligations of archive auditor while managing the immediate pressure of resource depletion in Soreheim Alliance.
hidden_pressure: Must keep suspicion disciplined so that inquiry does not collapse into factional theater. Around Miners’ Assembly, that usually means carrying resource depletion, sabotage, predatory frontier ecology without letting the role of archive auditor visibly slip.

adventure_hooks.summary: Working with Ysmir Coalward can place the party inside an active inquiry where every answer creates new exposure.
Ysmir Coalward can share a strong lead if the party retrieves testimony, material proof, or a missing intermediary.

support_scope_notes: Promoted from a preexisting named interface into the unified full-content NPC architecture. Sparse unsupported fields remain intentionally restrained. Appearance extended under V28_8 from role/locality/public-signal derivation rather than decorative fabrication.
public_signal: Questioning silence, inspection habits, and careful note-taking make Ysmir Coalward look like inquiry before accusation.

encounter_context.usual_environment: Miners’ Assembly: inquiry rooms, witness routes, guarded evidence sites, or contested scenes
who_seeks_them_out: those needing a problem solved quietly
